category_sources: source_facts.description says library for accessing discs and disc image files; official LibDsk page says it accesses floppy discs and disc image files for emulator tools, filesystems, and emulators.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libdsk; official homepage title and page heading use LIBDSK/LibDsk.
docs_sources: Official LibDsk page is the primary documentation surface, with introduction, supported disc types, utilities, Linux floppy support, changelog, and downloads.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official LibDsk page provides tarball downloads but no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and disk utility executables; official LibDsk page lists disc image formats, floppy access, emulator use, and command-line utilities.
